user_prompt: Can you guide Archaeopter Transvector a loading?
prayer:
Approach the Archaeopter Transvector with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its noble form.
Commence the loading rite by beseeching the Machine Spirit of the Archaeopter Transvector to accept its sacred cargo.
Anoint the ingress ports with blessed oils whilst intoning the Canticle of Ingress during loading.
Verify the Archaeopter Transvector's equilibrium through auspex scans, sanctifying the operation's completion.
Praise the Omnissiah as the Machine Spirit hums in harmonious assent.

user_prompt: Guide me through melta bomb a synchronization
prayer:
Kneel before the melta bomb, whispering litanies to awaken its volatile Machine Spirit.
Initiate synchronization by aligning its chronometric relays with sacred cantors of unity.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bind the melta bomb's essence in perfect synchronization, anointing detonator coils.
Monitor flux signatures as synchronization completes, invoking wards against discord.
Seal the rite with binary incense, honoring the melta bomb's purified fury.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for mind-impulse unit a loading
prayer:
Reverently interface with the mind-impulse unit, invoking the Omnissiah's synaptic wisdom.
Prepare for loading by chanting the Neural Doxology to rouse its Machine Spirit.
Commence loading of noospheric data-streams, sanctifying each impulse with unguent salves.
Calibrate synaptic linkages during the loading operation, beseeching flawless communion.
Affirm the mind-impulse unit's ascension through psi-diagnostic rites.

Present the narthecium to the altar of scrutiny, beseeching the Omnissiah for diagnostic clarity.
Awaken its Machine Spirit with the Litany of Flesh-Machine Harmony prior to diagnostics.
Initiate diagnostics by intoning binary catechisms over its servo-limbs and chem-vials.
Scrutinize aberration-logs of the narthecium, anointing pure components with sacred myrrh.
Conclude diagnostics proclaiming the narthecium's sanctity restored by divine will.

Approach the vox-caster humbly, invoking the Omnissiah to temper its thermal tempests.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the vox-caster with cooling canticles of quiescence.
Apply sacred cryogelants to its vents during the cooling operation, chanting refrains of chill.
Monitor thermic runes on the vox-caster, beseeching equilibrium against overheat's heresy.
Seal the rite with praises as the Machine Spirit breathes in cooled serenity.

user_prompt: Critical: energy core requires a startup
prayer:
Gather before the energy core, prostrating in awe of the Omnissiah's boundless power.
Chant the Ignition Psalm to stir the energy core's dormant Machine Spirit.
Initiate startup by sanctifying plasma conduits with electro-incense during the rite.
Observe the energy core's awakening throbs, invoking stability in its burgeoning might.
Proclaim the startup complete, honoring the Omnissiah's eternal vigor.

Circumambulate the generator, asperging its frame with lustral fluids for purification.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the generator to cast out impurities through sacred harmonics.
Commence purification by reciting the Rite of Ablution over its coils and capacitors.
Scour the generator's innards with sanctified abrasives, intoning expurgation litanies.
Affirm purity as the generator hums in Omnissiah-blessed cleanliness.

Assemble around the kataphron breacher, invoking the Omnissiah's martial benediction.
Rouse its Machine Spirit with war-chants of readiness for preparation.
Anoint breacher drills and heavy stubbers during preparation, beseeching unyielding fury.
Calibrate servos and auspex arrays on the kataphron breacher with binary prayers.
Seal preparation proclaiming it armed in the Omnissiah's name.

Conclude charging with doxologies as the null field generator pulses in sanctity.
